name: Gloucester High School Tennis Courts
description: These courts are no longer used for pickleball.  The tapes have been removed, and there is grass growing on the courts.  NO PB is happening on these courts.

name: Newington Baptist Church Gym
description: Come play pickleball at Newington Baptist Church Gym in Gloucester, VA! There are 3 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and lights.

name: Thousand Trails Chesapeake Bay Rv Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Thousand Trails Chesapeake Bay Rv Resort in Gloucester, VA! There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play.
